name: skill-json-generator
description: Generate, validate, and maintain skill.json package metadata files for AI agent skill packages

skills.name: skill-json-generator
skills.description: Generate skill.json package metadata files for AI agent skill packages. Use whenever the user wants to create, edit, or validate a skill.json, when packaging skills for distribution, or when preparing a skill repo for sharing with package managers like skmr, skillman, skillbox, skills-manifest, or skills-supply.
